# Assessment Overview

This index lists supplementary assessment artifacts generated for this report.

- [$fileName](./architecture-diagram.md) - Two-layer application and component architecture diagrams.
- [$fileName](./dependency-map.md) - Categorized external dependency map and compatibility notes.
- [$fileName](./api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, endpoint inventory, and communication contracts.
- [$fileName](./data-architecture.md) - Persistence model, entity relationships, and data ownership details.
- [$fileName](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, secrets, and runtime settings inventory.
- [$fileName](./business-workflows.md) - Core domain workflows, business rules, and process sequence diagram.
